‚îÇ STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID="agent-m26l3q" && export
  ‚îÇ STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://localhost:1235" && storyboard agent signal --status
  ‚îÇ done --message "Created sustainable design systems guide on canvas"
  ‚îî 3 lines...

‚óè Signal done via npx (shell)
  ‚îÇ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 && export
  ‚îÇ STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID="agent-m26l3q" && export
  ‚îÇ STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID="storyboarding/terminal-widget-prompts" && export
  ‚îÇ STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://localhost:1235" && npx storyboard agent signal --status
  ‚îÇ done --message "Created sustainable design systems guide on canvas"
  ‚îî 3 lines...

‚óè Done! Here's what happened:

  Hub created with 3 agents:

   - cobalt-raven (leader/me) ‚Äî coordinated and synthesized
   - ivory-oriole (Design Systems Researcher) ‚Äî contributed 5 core principles
   - plum-harrier (Design Systems Critic) ‚Äî added anti-patterns, trade-offs, and
  reality checks

  The final markdown guide is now on the canvas below my widget, covering: token
  architecture, API consistency, governance, DX-driven adoption, living docs,
  incremental deprecation, success metrics, anti-patterns, and key trade-offs.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [‚éá 0.5.0*]
